speaker: speaker1
text: Hello . Can you tell me what the procedures of applying for a job are ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yes , of course . There are many steps . You can apply for the job on the Internet and then send your resume to the e-mail address of the company . And wail the feedback of the company .

speaker: speaker1
text: What is the qualification needed by the position ?

speaker: speaker2
text: You must have over 2 years'experience first .
